reviews.author: Amir Goldstein
reviews.summary: Reviewer requested further review of three related lookup patches before providing a detailed assessment.
reviews.raw_body:
The 3 lookup patches look fine in general, but I will review them more
closely after I have a clear understanding on the desired protocol.

Thanks,
Amir.

2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch adds passthrough lookup support to the FUSE file system. When a backing ID is set for a fuse inode, it associates the inode with the corresponding backing inode for passthrough operations. If no backing ID is set, it caches statx attributes from the reply. The changes are made in the fs/fuse/dir.c file and involve modifications to the fuse_process_entry2 function and the fuse_dentry_revalidate function.
